For more information about how and why Judith and the Labour Party uses your information and your rights, see our privacy policy: https://labour.org.uk/privacy/privacy-notices/general-electorate-privacy-notice/ Privacy Policy QUICK NAVIGATION Home A bout Judith Contact Judith News Campaigns Useful Links ​ STAY CONNECTED Facebook Twitter Instagram GET IN TOUCH Email: judith.cummins.mp@parliament.uk . ​ Tel (Constituency Office): +44 (0) 1274 924280 ​ Post: 26-28 Church Bank, Bradford BD1 4DZ ​ ​ Media Inquiries ​ Promoted by Andrew Thornton on behalf of Judith Cummins both at 6 Beechwood Road, Bradford BD6 3AQ. bottom of page
